implementation_cross_check.source_role: MMB implementation cross-check only; not paper-side mathematical source

notes: Primary OCR Markdown exposes the model overview, household and entrepreneur default-contract equations, bank capital-ratio wedge, retail interest-rate setting problems, policy rules, and calibration targets.
No appendix normalization file exists for EA_DKR11.
No PDF body was opened; raw PDF existence and hash were recorded for provenance.
Several long FOC blocks are summarized from paper-side conditions and implementation cross-check notation; all such compacted formulas are marked needs_review.
Implementation cross-check confirms nonlinear Dynare form, variable families, shock names, banking block variables, and observation equations, but was not used as paper-side mathematical evidence.

runtime_validation.notes: Current phase is private derivation extraction only.

copyright_boundary: The derivation summarizes model structure and equations. It does not copy long prose from the paper or appendix.
